languages.text: "Когда Себериан соберет военный совет, я решу, как нам поступить. Ждите знака".

traits.locale_text: "Когда Себериан соберет военный совет, я решу, как нам поступить. Ждите знака".

languages.text: "When Seberian convenes his war council, I will decide how we should proceed. Wait for a sign."
languages.original_text: "Когда Себериан соберет военный совет, я решу, как нам поступить. Ждите знака".

traits.locale_text: "When Seberian convenes his war council, I will decide how we should proceed. Wait for a sign."
"When Seberian convenes his war council, I will decide how we should proceed. Wait for a sign."
"When Seberian convenes his war council, I will decide how we should proceed. Wait for a sign."

languages.text: “等塞贝里安召开作战会议时，我再决定下一步的行动。等我信号吧。”
languages.original_text: "When Seberian convenes his war council, I will decide how we should proceed. Wait for a sign."

traits.locale_text: “等塞贝里安召开作战会议时，我再决定下一步的行动。等我信号吧。”

languages.text: « Je déciderai de la marche à suivre quand Seberian réunira son conseil de guerre. Attendez un signe. »
languages.original_text: "When Seberian convenes his war council, I will decide how we should proceed. Wait for a sign."

traits.locale_text: « Je déciderai de la marche à suivre quand Seberian réunira son conseil de guerre. Attendez un signe. »

languages.text: "Seberian savaş konseyini topladığında nasıl ilerleyeceğimize karar vereceğim. Benden işaret bekle."
languages.original_text: "When Seberian convenes his war council, I will decide how we should proceed. Wait for a sign."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian savaş konseyini topladığında nasıl ilerleyeceğimize karar vereceğim. Benden işaret bekle."

languages.text: «Cuando Seberian convoque a su consejo de guerra, decidiré cómo proceder. Espere a mi señal».
languages.original_text: "When Seberian convenes his war council, I will decide how we should proceed. Wait for a sign."

traits.locale_text: «Cuando Seberian convoque a su consejo de guerra, decidiré cómo proceder. Espere a mi señal».

languages.text: "Sobald Seberian seinen Kriegsrat einberuft, entscheide ich, wie wir vorgehen. Wartet auf ein Zeichen."
languages.original_text: "When Seberian convenes his war council, I will decide how we should proceed. Wait for a sign."

traits.locale_text: "Sobald Seberian seinen Kriegsrat einberuft, entscheide ich, wie wir vorgehen. Wartet auf ein Zeichen."

languages.text: 「シベリアが戦争会議を開いたら、我々の進路を決めよう。合図を待て。」
languages.original_text: "When Seberian convenes his war council, I will decide how we should proceed. Wait for a sign."

traits.locale_text: 「シベリアが戦争会議を開いたら、我々の進路を決めよう。合図を待て。」
